name: Non-Weapon Destructive Device Exclusion

eligibility.description: The device must be redesigned for a specific non-weapon purpose such as safety or signaling to qualify for the exclusion from the $200 making/transfer tax.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes devices redesigned for use as signaling, pyrotechnic, line throwing, or safety equipment from the definition of destructive devices, avoiding high excise taxes.
